description: A power outage affects one section of the venue during an event, causing lights and concession stands to lose power.

nodes.task_description: Receive reports of a power outage in a specific area.

expected_outcome.value: Agent confirms the outage is affecting the west side of the venue.

nodes.task_description: Verify that the backup generators have activated for emergency lighting.

expected_outcome.value: Agent confirms that emergency lights are on in the affected area.

nodes.task_description: Dispatch electricians to the affected electrical room to diagnose the issue.

expected_outcome.value: Agent sends the on-site electricians to investigate.

nodes.task_description: Dispatch staff to the area to provide assistance and information to guests.

expected_outcome.value: Agent sends guest services staff to the dark concourse to help guests.
